channel.title: Goalng on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Goalng on David's Blog

item.title: Go Scheduler (2) - Go Advanced
item.description: 原文: Scheduling In Go : Part I - OS Scheduler OS Scheduler Your program is just a series of machine instructions that need to be executed one after the other sequentially. To make that happen, the operating system uses the concept of a Thread. It’s the job of the Thread to account for and sequentially execute the set of instructions it’s assigned.
